## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `swift test`.
- [ ] I updated or added tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated README or DocC documentation for public API changes.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this is release-facing.
- [ ] I considered accessibility and Dynamic Type for SwiftUI changes.
- [ ] I avoided real network calls in tests.
- [ ] I avoided new dependencies unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] I checked whether this changes public API or Codable JSON shape.
